summary: Ran the full Rails test suite (112 runs, 402 assertions, 0 failures, 0 errors, 0 skips) and rubocop-rails-omakase (115 files, no offenses). The iteration-4 fix replaced the broken `Turbo::Broadcastable::TestHelper` usage (previously a blocker: that module never loads in this app because its `:action_cable` on_load hook never fires) with `assert_enqueued_with(job: Turbo::Streams::ActionBroadcastJob, ...)`, matching the app's established pattern, and the suite now loads and passes cleanly, including the new tests for Pipelines::BroadcastStatus and the live status summary. No worker/TypeScript files changed in this feature, so no typecheck was applicable. No development/production database commands were run — only db:test:prepare and bin/rails test in RAILS_ENV=test.
